message:
test(providers): add normalize_anthropic_base unit tests and proptest

Adds test coverage for the Anthropic base URL normalization function, which
ensures base URLs end with /v1/messages. This was previously untested despite
similar normalization functions for OpenAI and Gemini having full coverage.

Unit tests:
- normalize_anthropic_base_appends_v1_messages: bare domain gets /v1/messages
- normalize_anthropic_base_keeps_existing_v1_messages: idempotent when already
  correctly suffixed
- normalize_anthropic_base_strips_trailing_slash: trailing slash is stripped
  before appending /v1/messages

Proptest:
- normalize_anthropic_base_is_idempotent_and_targets_v1_messages: for any
  arbitrary base URL string, normalization is idempotent and always produces
  a URL ending in /v1/messages (mirrors the existing proptests for OpenAI
  and OpenAI Responses base normalization)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
